form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr4) over 2000m at this track, beaten 8 m by Brookies Player (2:27.00) in 3yo+ on April 7. Before that, 6th (Fr8) over 2200m at Cambridge Raceway beaten 16 m by Midfrew Lando (2:44.90) in 3yo+ on March 26 at $35.70. Drawn to advantage and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Ran well last start showing plenty of improvement following March 29 run. Just managed to hang on and win won by a 0.5 m (Sr1) at this track (2:30.20) beating Dream On Lou in 3yo+ on March 31 at $16.20. This race will be harder than that win. Tougher assignment this time.
